mapper.update: UPDATE article SET status = 2 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET like_count = like_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET comment_count = comment_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT category_id AS categoryId, COUNT(*) AS count FROM article WHERE status != 2 GROUP BY category_id ORDER BY count DESC
